calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR For The Purpose Of Posting Tentative Ruling
Off Calendar Apr-08-2026 Off Calendar

Motion To Quash Subpoena To Frost Bank Or, In The Alternative, For Protective Order;
Off Calendar Apr-10-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Aya Kanda for moving party Ellen Crabaugh.
Ryan Meckfessel for trustee Michael Rubly, who was also present (via Zoom).

The matter was called for hearing on Ellen Crabaugh's Motion to Quash Subpoena to Frost Bank or, in the Alternative, for Protective Order.

Ms. Kanda contested the Court's tentative ruling denying the motion and requested that the Court decline to award monetary sanctions and limit the scope of the subpoena, including narrowing requests for communications. Mr. Meckfessel requested that the Court adopt the tentative ruling, including the award of sanctions.

After hearing argument, the Court took the matter under submission and indicated it would adopt the tentative ruling with possible modification, including reconsideration of sanctions and potential limitation of the scope of certain requests.

Judge: Russell S. Roeca; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)

Petition To Appoint Successor Trustee To Fill Vacancy
Off Calendar Apr-01-2026 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Ryan Meckfessel appeared in person for and with Michael Rubly, Michelle Rubly and Gabreil Rubly (beneficiaries).
Aya Kanda appeared via zoom for Ellen Crabaugh (objector).

Discussion was held that the judication in California is correct. The matter is taken under submission with the intent to grant.

Judge: Russell S. Roeca. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Cece. Not reported.
